notes: v0.16.88 — Mini-boss crash hotfix (revert MiniBoss.new) + keep z=8 fix. v0.16.86/87 switched the spawn to MiniBoss.new() via the class_name global — that crashed the Windows build right after the music carousel (likely a class_name registration quirk in the exported PCK; headless build didn't hit it). Reverted to the proven Combatant.new() + set_script(MiniBossScript) pattern that doesn't crash, and kept all the explicit force-init. The KEY fix from the v0.16.85 diag stays: z_index = 8 so the boss isn't drawn under the arena background. Queen-drone backstop is now 'in'-guarded so a partial script chain can't crash the call. Diag strip + console log stay one more release. Windows only.
